title: HMM ITB Digital Portal
description: The primary digital infrastructure for the Mechanical Engineering Student Union at ITB. Streamlines internal communication and data management for a large-scale engineering community through secure member authentication and a custom CRM.

title: Pamoka Garut Official
description: The central digital representative for Paguyuban Mojang Jajaka Garut. Built to bridge regional culture with modern youth leadership, featuring real-time news updates, program management, and automated registration systems for the Pasanggiri event.

title: IAM ITB Alumni Network
description: A professional networking portal for the Mechanical Engineering Alumni of ITB. Features a high-performance alumni directory and interactive community modules designed to strengthen the 'Solidarity Forever' legacy through modern tech.

title: Gumelar 2026 Hub
description: A strategic collaboration platform for 11+ regional student organizations. Designed to coordinate community development and regional contribution programs, featuring interactive countdowns and integrated event mapping for Garut youth.

title: Executive Member Dashboard
description: A specialized administrative dashboard providing granular control over organizational workflows. Features automated reporting, member dynamics tracking, and document management specifically for HMM ITB's leadership.

title: Mechanical Festival 2025
description: A dynamic landing page for ITB’s premier mechanical engineering festival. Focuses on immersive visual storytelling and high engagement through fluid animations that reflect the intersection of engineering and creativity.

title: Pemira KM ITB 2024
description: The official high-traffic election platform for the ITB Student Cabinet. Optimized for reliability and transparency, handling thousands of concurrent users with features including live statistical tracking and candidate profiles.

title: ZYX Education Platform
description: A structured learning platform for ITB engineering students. Features an interactive 'Math & Science Playground' and modular course layouts to help students master foundational engineering concepts with tutor-led guidance.

title: Sentuh Undang Platform
description: A premium digital invitation service uniquely integrating West Javanese culture. Features Batik Garutan aesthetics, formal Basa Sunda Lemes options, and an integrated dashboard for MCs to track guest arrival via QR codes.

title: FESS Monitoring & Digital Twin
description: A high-fidelity monitoring HMI for a levitating vertical Flywheel Energy Storage System (FESS). Features real-time spectral analysis (FFT), vibration health tracking, and a 3D digital twin to visualize thermal and rotational dynamics.

title: IIoT Conveyor Interface
description: A real-time industrial monitoring dashboard for conveyor belt systems. Bridges physical sensors with digital analytics to track throughput, belt health, and operational uptime in a mechatronic laboratory environment.
